ingredients: rice pasta, tomato sauce, garlic, olive oil, basil
recipe_steps: Cook rice pasta per package instructions until al dente. Sauté garlic in olive oil until golden, then stir in tomato sauce and simmer 5 minutes. Toss drained pasta with sauce, top with fresh basil, and serve.

ingredients: salmon fillet, lemon, asparagus, olive oil, herbs
recipe_steps: Season salmon fillet with lemon juice, salt, and herbs. Grill on medium-high heat for 4–5 minutes per side until cooked through. Serve alongside steamed asparagus drizzled with olive oil.

ingredients: lentils, carrots, celery, onion, vegetable broth, spices
recipe_steps: Sauté onion, carrots, and celery in a pot until softened. Add lentils, vegetable broth, and spices, then bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 25 minutes until lentils are tender.

ingredients: chickpeas, spinach, tomatoes, coconut milk, curry powder
recipe_steps: Heat oil and sauté onion until translucent. Add chickpeas, spinach, tomatoes, and coconut milk, then stir in curry powder. Simmer on low heat for 15 minutes until the stew thickens.

ingredients: ground turkey, lettuce leaves, ginger, soy sauce, water chestnuts
recipe_steps: Brown ground turkey in a skillet with ginger and soy sauce until cooked through. Stir in water chestnuts and cook for 2 more minutes. Spoon the mixture into lettuce leaves and serve immediately.

ingredients: cauliflower, bell peppers, broccoli, tofu, soy sauce
recipe_steps: Pulse cauliflower florets in a food processor until rice-sized. Stir-fry in a hot pan with oil for 5–6 minutes. Top with your choice of protein, vegetables, and sauce, then serve warm.

ingredients: almond flour, eggs, almond milk, maple syrup, baking powder
recipe_steps: Mix almond flour, eggs, and a pinch of salt into a smooth batter. Cook spoonfuls on a lightly greased non-stick pan over medium heat for 2–3 minutes per side. Serve with fresh fruit or honey.

ingredients: tofu, coconut milk, sweet potato, peas, curry paste
recipe_steps: Sauté onions and garlic in oil until soft, then add curry paste and cook for 1 minute. Add vegetables, coconut milk, and simmer for 20 minutes. Serve over steamed rice with fresh coriander.

ingredients: tofu, broccoli, carrots, snap peas, soy sauce, sesame oil
recipe_steps: Press and cube tofu, then pan-fry until golden on all sides. Add vegetables and stir-fry on high heat for 4–5 minutes. Toss with soy sauce and sesame oil, then serve over rice.

ingredients: quinoa, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, feta cheese, lemon dressing
recipe_steps: Rinse and cook quinoa in water for 15 minutes, then let cool. Toss with chopped vegetables, fresh herbs, lemon juice, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper and serve at room temperature.

ingredients: whole wheat wrap, hummus, cucumber, olives, feta cheese
recipe_steps: Spread hummus on a whole-wheat wrap and layer with cucumber, tomatoes, olives, and feta. Add a drizzle of olive oil and roll tightly. Slice in half and serve with a side salad.

ingredients: eggs, spinach, mushrooms, cheddar cheese, avocado
recipe_steps: Whisk eggs with salt, pepper, and a splash of cream. Pour into a buttered skillet and cook on medium-low, letting the edges set. Add fillings, fold the omelette, and slide onto a plate.

ingredients: rice pasta, tomato sauce, garlic, olive oil, basil
recipe_steps: Cook rice pasta per package instructions until al dente. Sauté garlic in olive oil until golden, then stir in tomato sauce and simmer 5 minutes. Toss drained pasta with sauce, top with fresh basil, and serve.

ingredients: whole wheat crust, tomato sauce, mozzarella, bell peppers, olives
recipe_steps: Spread tomato sauce over prepared dough, add mozzarella and vegetables. Bake at 220°C for 12–15 minutes until crust is golden and cheese is bubbling. Slice and serve hot.

ingredients: quinoa, chickpeas, avocado, sweet potato, kale, tahini
recipe_steps: Roast vegetables and chickpeas at 200°C for 20 minutes until tender. Cook grains according to package instructions. Arrange everything in a bowl with greens, tahini dressing, and seeds.

ingredients: grilled chicken, sweet potato, broccoli, avocado, olive oil
recipe_steps: Season chicken with herbs and grill or roast until cooked through. Roast sweet potatoes with olive oil at 200°C for 25 minutes. Assemble bowl with greens, chicken, sweet potato, and avocado.

ingredients: eggplant, marinara sauce, mozzarella, parmesan, basil
recipe_steps: Slice and salt eggplant, let sit 10 minutes, then pat dry. Dip slices in egg and breadcrumbs and pan-fry until golden. Layer with marinara and mozzarella, bake at 190°C for 20 minutes.

ingredients: avocado, bacon, hard boiled egg, mixed greens, ranch dressing
recipe_steps: Cube ripe avocado and toss gently with lime juice to prevent browning. Combine with cherry tomatoes, red onion, and fresh coriander. Season with salt, chilli flakes, and a drizzle of olive oil.

ingredients: chicken breast, bell peppers, onion, soy sauce, ginger
recipe_steps: Slice chicken thinly and marinate in soy sauce and garlic for 10 minutes. Stir-fry on high heat with vegetables for 5–6 minutes until cooked. Finish with sesame oil and serve over rice.

ingredients: shrimp, zucchini noodles, garlic, lemon, parmesan
recipe_steps: Spiralize zucchini into noodles and set aside. Sauté shrimp in garlic butter for 2–3 minutes per side until pink. Toss zoodles with shrimp, cherry tomatoes, and a squeeze of lemon.

ingredients: greek yogurt, honey, granola, mixed berries, walnuts
recipe_steps: Layer Greek yogurt in a glass with granola and fresh berries. Repeat layers and drizzle with honey. Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to an hour before serving.
